gates.summary: deployment preflight passes for the selected profile with fail-closed bind and auth posture
deployment recipe was generated from the canonical profile manifest and includes env, compose, systemd, and rollback artifacts
staging smoke covers queue posture, retrieval diagnostics, checkpoint/replay metadata, and flow runtime surfaces
support bundle export captures config, queue, retrieval, replay, flow, and worker posture
rollback plan was generated and reviewed for config, migrations, flow tables, replay schema, and rollout flags
worker-enabled promotion requires an expected worker digest and explicit execution-plane egress review before broad rollout
